Author: platis
Name: XIV.fm
Punchline: Share what you are listening to in Final Fantasy XIV.
Description: XIV.fm displays Last.fm listening presence on cards anchored above player nameplates.
Changelog:
Initial XIV.fm development build.

- Renders a placeholder card above the local player.
- Provides developer mock cards for loaded remote players.
- Applies strict character/world matching and an 8-yalm default range.
- Captures typed world, territory, map, and instance diagnostics.

This prerelease is intended only for placement and lifecycle testing. Last.fm linking and the XIV.fm server are not implemented yet.
